title: woodsia neomexicana
intro: Woodsia neomexicana, also known as New Mexico lady fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Woodsia neomexicana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Woodsia neomexicana can be made by infusing the plant in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and powdering the leaves to be used in capsules or topical applications.
